source_name: The Australia Institute - 25% gas export tax proposal (Denniss & Saunders, Mar 2026)
notes: The Australia Institute report "We have already missed out on $63.8 billion in taxes from gas exports" by Richard Denniss and Matt Saunders, published 20 March 2026. Headline finding: if a 25 per cent tax on Australia's natural gas exports had been enacted in 2022, it would have already raised A$63.8 billion by the publication date. Modelled by The Australia Institute. Headline figure only; consult the full report for methodology and assumptions.
source_rights: CC BY 4.0 (The Australia Institute, where stated)
citation: The Australia Institute, gas export tax / Petroleum Resource Rent Tax reform analysis.

fields.report_title: We have already missed out on $63.8 billion in taxes from gas exports
fields.comparison_baseline: 25% Commonwealth tax on gas exports, hypothetically enacted in 2022
